channel.title: Soviet Union on Grim Chronicle
channel.description: Recent content in Soviet Union on Grim Chronicle

item.title: Chernobyl: The Night the Soviet Union Lied to the World
item.description: On April 26, 1986, reactor number four at the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant exploded. What followed was not just a nuclear disaster — it was one of the most catastrophic cover-ups in modern history.

item.title: The Dyatlov Pass Incident: Nine Hikers Dead, No Explanation That Makes Sense
item.description: In February 1959, nine experienced Soviet hikers died on a mountain in the Ural range under circumstances so bizarre that investigators officially concluded an 'unknown compelling force' had killed them. The case has never been fully solved.
